title: INOX Air Products Commissions its First Green Hydrogen Plant at Asahi Indiaâ€™s Soniyana Facility at Chittorgarh
content: INOX Air Products (INOXAP), Indiaâ€™s largest manufacturer of industrial, electronic and medical gases, announced the successful commissioning of its first-ever Green Hydrogen manufacturing Plant at Asahi India Glass Limitedâ€™s (AIS) greenfield float glass facility at Soniyana in Chittorgarh, Rajasthan. AIS, Indiaâ€™s leading glass manufacturer, have entered into a 20-year offtake agreement with INOXAP for supply of Green Hydrogen, to this facility.
author: Analysts Account
